name: Tolling of Refund Deadlines for Financial Disability

eligibility.description: Individuals with a medically determinable impairment that is expected to result in death or last at least 12 months, preventing them from managing financial affairs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Suspends the running of the 3-year/2-year refund limitation periods during any period an individual is 'financially disabled' (unable to manage financial affairs due to medically determinable physical or mental impairment).
